verify.subject: Verify your Email address
verify.title: Welcome to the platform!
verify.body: Thank you for registering. To complete your account activation, click the button below:
verify.fallback: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
verify.footer: This link will expire in 24 hours. If you did not request this registration, please ignore this email.

reset.subject: Password Reset Request
reset.title: Password Reset
reset.body: You requested to reset your account password. Click the link below to proceed:
reset.footer: If you did not request a reset, please ignore this email and your password will remain unchanged. This link will expire in 1 hour.

change.subject: Confirm your Email address change
change.body: Click the link below to confirm your new email address:

studentInvite.subject: You have been invited to the platform
studentInvite.title: Invitation to the platform
studentInvite.body: Your teacher has invited you to join the platform. Click the button to complete your registration (first name, last name, age and password):
studentInvite.fallback: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
studentInvite.footer: This link is personal and will expire soon. If you were not expecting this invitation, you can ignore this email.

teacherInvite.subject: Teacher invitation to the platform
teacherInvite.title: Teacher Invitation
teacherInvite.body: An administrator has invited you to join the platform as a teacher. Click the button to complete your registration (first name, last name and password):
teacherInvite.fallback: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
teacherInvite.footer: This link is personal and will expire soon. If you were not expecting this invitation, you can ignore this email.

digest.subject: You have {{count}} new notifications on the platform
digest.title: Notifications summary
digest.intro: Here is a summary of what happened since the last email. You have {{count}} notifications to read in total.
digest.footer: You receive this summary email because notifications are enabled. You can change your preferences or turn them off in your profile settings.
